chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CP No.D-7186 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 30.09.2025. Mr. Niaz Ali, Advocate the Petitioner. Chaudhary Azhar Elahi, Advocate for the Respondents No.2 to 5. --------------- Learned counsel in attendance are ad-idem that the Petition may be disposed of on the under taking of the Respondent that the amounts due on account of the service of deceased Ishfaq Ahmed may be deposited in Succession Appeal No.01 of 2015 pending before the Circuit Court at Larkana. They submit that such dues are as follows: i. Rs.64,962.81/- [Provident Fund]. ii. Rs.205,265/- [Deposited by State Life Insurance Corporation in the main Branch of NBP Shikarpur]. Under the circumstances, the Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
